parameters.subject: =Renewal Risk Alert: {{ $json.account_name }} ({{ $json.risk_level }})
parameters.html:
=

Renewal Risk Alert

Account: {{ $json.account_name }}
ARR: ${{ $json.arr }}
Renewal: {{ $json.renewal_date }} ({{ $json.days_to_renewal }} days)
Risk Level: {{ $json.risk_level }}

Risk Signals

    {{ $json.risk_signals.map(s => '
  • ' + s + '
    • ').join('') }}

Recommended Actions

    {{ $json.recommended_actions.map(a => '
  • ' + a + '
    • ').join('') }}
